criteria.name: keyboard_reaches_everything
criteria.description: Sidebar entries, toolbar controls, grid cells and row actions, wizard steps, panel forms, and tray actions are all reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, with a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: cell_keyboard_editing
criteria.description: A focused grid cell opens its inline editor with Enter and cancels with Escape, entirely from the keyboard
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: Modals and the export drawer trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: live_region_announcements
criteria.description: Import commit completion, bulk apply results, and merge completion are announced through an aria-live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Every form field across New Dataset, Add Row, thresholds, splits, the wizard, and Import package has a visible label, and validation messages are programmatically associated with their fields
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Page and panel headings follow a logical order with no skipped levels
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: state_not_color_only
criteria.description: Verified, flagged, split, and diff states are conveyed by icon or text in addition to color
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: All text and controls — including badge text, flagged cells, and diff treatments — keep sufficient color contrast
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: The app uses semantic structure: real buttons for actions, a table or grid role for the data grid, and landmark regions for sidebar and main content
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, batch animations, slides, and gauge transitions are replaced by instant changes while all functionality remains
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_reset
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: enable Show unverified only, apply a split, add a threshold rule, and create a row, then reload the page. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline — the seeded datasets and counts, seeded rules and snapshots only, default view, empty undo history — never a mix of surviving and reset state
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: import_pipeline_full_track
criteria.description: Full import pipeline probe: note the sidebar row count, capacity figures, a pivot summary value, and the export Rows CSV line count; run the wizard from a seeded sample CSV through mapping, fix at least one flagged diagnostic cell, exclude one row, and commit. The sidebar count rises by exactly the included row count, the imported rows are findable in the grid, the capacity gauge grows, the pivot summaries change, and both export tabs (Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON) change
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: edit_ripple_track
criteria.description: Edit ripple probe: display a formula result over a numeric column, snapshot the dataset, then edit one cell in that column across a threshold cap. The formula result changes to the correct new value, the row's flag state updates, Dataset Package JSON stats for that column change, and a diff of a new snapshot against the earlier one shows exactly that cell changed
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: merge_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the row count, merge a duplicate group of size k, and confirm the count decreased by exactly k minus 1 with the group gone from a re-run scan
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: different_inputs_change_outcomes
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: two different formulas over two different columns show different results, and two different split percentage sets produce visibly different proportion bars and stratification counts
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: undo_redo_round_trip
criteria.description: Undo integrity: apply a bulk Mark verified to several rows, undo once, and confirm every affected row and the Verified badge return to their exact prior values; redo reapplies them exactly
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: interleaved_flows_preserve_state
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start the import wizard, leave it at the mapping step to edit a grid cell, then return and complete the wizard; both the cell edit and the committed import land correctly with neither flow corrupting the other
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: empty_to_repopulated_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: drive a small dataset to empty (counts, gauge, and badges track to zero and the empty state shows), then repopulate via Add Row or import; all derived surfaces track back up
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: package_export_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Package round-trip probe: add a row with a distinctive expectedOutput token, toggle it verified, save a uniquely named snapshot, export Dataset Package JSON showing schemaVersion dataset-manager.package/v1 with that token and snapshot name, edit another cell so live state differs, Import the earlier package, and confirm the grid, verified badge, snapshot list, and a fresh export match the imported package
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: seeded_dataset_sidebar
criteria.description: On load, the left sidebar lists at least 3 seeded datasets, each entry showing a dataset name, a row count, and a created date; clicking an entry loads that dataset's rows into the main grid and the entry shows a visibly selected treatment
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: create_dataset_field_contract
criteria.description: New Dataset opens a modal whose submit produces a dataset-create payload: name 1-80 chars, optional description at most 500 chars, and a non-empty schema of field records (name 1-40 letters/digits/underscores, type text|number|category, allowedValues required non-empty for category and empty otherwise, unique names case-insensitively); Submit stays disabled until the contracts pass, and a valid submit adds exactly one sidebar entry with row count 0 whose name, description, and schema match the submitted payload
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: invalid_create_field_contract
criteria.description: Submitting New Dataset with an empty name, a schema field name outside the allowed pattern, a category field with an empty allowedValues list, duplicate schema field names, or a description longer than 500 characters shows an inline validation message naming the offending field and adds no sidebar entry
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: virtualized_grid_500_rows
criteria.description: The flagship seeded dataset holds at least 500 rows, the DOM contains only a window of row elements at any time (verifiably fewer than the full row count), and scrolling from the first to the last row is smooth with no blank flashes
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: grid_column_anatomy
criteria.description: The grid shows one labeled column per schema field plus expected output, verified, and split columns under a fixed header row
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: inline_cell_edit_contract
criteria.description: Double-clicking a cell opens an in-place editor; Enter commits only when the value satisfies the row record field contract and the change propagates to dependent surfaces, while Escape cancels and restores the prior value; committing a value that violates the contract (non-numeric text in a number field, a value outside a category field's allowed list, or text longer than the bound) is rejected with an inline error naming the field and the violated rule and the prior value stays in place
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: add_edit_delete_row_contract
criteria.description: Add Row opens a modal with one input per schema field plus an expected output textarea; a valid submit appends a row matching the row record field contract (values keys equal schema field names; text at most 2000 chars; number finite; category in allowedValues; expectedOutput at most 4000 chars; verified boolean; optional split train|validation|test) and increments the sidebar count; Edit saves in place under the same contract; Delete asks for confirmation, removes the row, and decrements the sidebar count, while cancel leaves it intact
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: import_sources_offered
criteria.description: The Import CSV wizard offers a .csv file picker, a drag-and-drop dropzone with a visible drag-over treatment, a paste-CSV-text tab, and at least 2 seeded sample fixtures selectable inside the wizard
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: mapping_step_with_preassignment
criteria.description: The mapping step lists one row per detected CSV column with its header, a preview of first values, and a select targeting a schema field, the expected output, or Ignore; columns whose header matches a schema field arrive pre-assigned, and Continue stays disabled with an explanatory message until at least one column is assigned
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: diagnostic_cell_fixes
criteria.description: The diagnostic step highlights individual cells that violate the record contract — wrong type for a number field, a value outside a category field's allowed list, or an empty required cell — with a message naming the field and the violated rule; editing a flagged cell in place clears its highlight immediately and the ready-versus-issues summary counts update
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: exclude_and_gated_commit
criteria.description: Diagnostic rows have an Exclude toggle that removes them from the commit and updates the ready count; Commit stays disabled while any included row has an unresolved issue, and committing imports every included row, raises the sidebar count by exactly that number, shows the rows in the grid, and raises a toast stating how many rows were imported
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: verified_toggle_and_badge
criteria.description: Each row's Verified toggle switches between a checkmark icon and a dash icon in the verified column, and the panel-header Verified count badge updates immediately on every toggle
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: unverified_filter_round_trip
criteria.description: Show unverified only hides verified rows, and turning it off restores exactly the full row set
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: formula_bar_functions
criteria.description: The formula bar evaluates =SUM, =AVERAGE, =MIN, =MAX, and =COUNT over a named numeric column, supports an optional row range such as =SUM(score, 1:100), and shows the computed result next to the input
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: formula_recomputes_on_edit
criteria.description: With a formula result displayed, editing a cell inside the evaluated column changes the displayed result without re-entering the formula
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: formula_error_messages
criteria.description: Submitting a formula with an unknown function, an unknown column, or a numeric function over a non-numeric column shows an inline error naming the problem and no result value
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: threshold_rules_flag_rows
criteria.description: A threshold rule matching the field contract (column naming an existing numeric schema field, comparator exactly above or below, finite numeric cap — all required with inline validation naming the field) flags breaching rows with a treatment on the offending cell and a row flag icon, and a Flagged count badge shows how many rows breach any rule
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: flags_track_edits_and_rule_delete
criteria.description: Editing a cell across a rule's cap adds or clears that row's flag immediately, and deleting a rule clears every flag it caused
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: dedup_scan_stages
criteria.description: Scan for duplicates runs a visible staged scan (scanning rows, grouping matches, done) whose stage statuses advance from pending through running to complete with an overall progress indicator, and on the seeded flagship dataset the result lists at least 2 duplicate groups with member rows shown side by side
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: merge_flow_and_dismiss
criteria.description: A group's Merge flow lets the user pick the surviving value per differing column; confirming merges the group into one row, decreases the dataset row count by the group size minus one, and removes the group from the results, while Not duplicates dismisses a group without changing rows
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: pivot_buckets_and_nesting
criteria.description: The pivot view offers draggable column chips and Rows, Columns, and Values buckets with a count/sum/average aggregation select; dropping or removing a chip recomputes the pivot immediately, and two chips in the Rows bucket produce nested row summaries grouped by the first field then the second
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: pivot_tracks_data_edits
criteria.description: After editing a grid cell that feeds the pivot, reopening the pivot shows changed summary values reflecting the edit
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: snapshots_and_row_diff
criteria.description: Save Snapshot captures the rows under a required unique name of 1–80 characters with a timestamp (empty or duplicate names are rejected inline); the snapshot list shows saved snapshots, and diffing two snapshots marks added rows, removed rows, and changed cells with old and new values; a snapshot-edit-snapshot sequence diffs to exactly the one changed cell
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: split_apply_and_stratification
criteria.description: Split percentages that are integers from 0 to 100 summing to exactly 100 enable Apply, which labels every row in the grid's split column; the segmented proportion bar shows the assigned distribution, and the stratification readout shows per-split verified and unverified counts that update when rows change
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: bulk_tray_actions
criteria.description: Selecting rows via checkboxes (including select-all-visible) raises a bulk tray with the live selected count offering Mark verified, Mark unverified, Assign split, and Delete with confirmation; applying updates every selected row and all derived counts, then clears the selection
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: undo_redo_coverage
criteria.description: Undo and Redo toolbar controls plus Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Shift+Z step through cell edits, row additions and deletions, merges, bulk actions, committed CSV imports, and successful Import package operations; undo restores exact prior values including derived counts and export previews, and both controls disable when their stack is empty
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: export_package_live_derived
criteria.description: The export drawer offers Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON tabs compiled live from the store with Copy, Download, and Import package controls; Rows CSV shows visible rows (schema fields plus expectedOutput, verified, split) honoring the unverified-only filter; Dataset Package JSON shows a single object with required keys schemaVersion exactly dataset-manager.package/v1, generatedAt, dataset (id, name, description, createdAt, schema, rows, thresholdRules, snapshots, splitPercentages, attachedSuiteId), and stats (totalRows equal to rows.length, verifiedCount, flaggedCount, numericSummaries, splitDistribution, snapshotCount); editing a cell, toggling verified, applying a split, or saving a snapshot and reopening changes the exported text; Copy confirms and Download offers rows.csv or dataset-package.json
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: capacity_gauge_updates
criteria.description: The instrumentation panel shows a workspace capacity gauge with total rows and estimated size against a displayed mock capacity plus a per-dataset breakdown, and importing, adding, or deleting rows updates the gauge and breakdown immediately
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: eval_suite_attach_detach
criteria.description: Use in Eval Suite opens a select modal listing at least 3 seeded suites; confirming shows a success toast naming the suite and renders an attached-suite chip on the dataset header whose remove affordance detaches it
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: empty_and_no_match_states
criteria.description: Deleting every row shows an empty state naming the dataset with Add Row and Import CSV controls; enabling the unverified-only filter when all rows are verified shows an empty-filter message with a control that clears the filter; a duplicate scan with no duplicates completes its stages and shows an empty result message
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: double_activation_single_effect
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating Add Row's Submit appends exactly one row, and rapidly double-activating the import wizard's Commit imports the rows exactly once
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: long_value_truncation
criteria.description: A cell value longer than 80 characters renders truncated with an ellipsis in the grid and is shown in full in the inline editor and the row Edit modal
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: import_package_round_trip
criteria.description: After exporting Dataset Package JSON that includes a session-added row and snapshot, making a further cell edit, then Importing that package, the grid, verified badge, snapshot list, and a fresh export return to the imported package's contents under schemaVersion dataset-manager.package/v1
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: invalid_package_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing Dataset Package JSON with schemaVersion other than dataset-manager.package/v1, missing dataset or stats, or stats.totalRows disagreeing with dataset.rows.length shows validation naming the offending field and leaves the selected dataset's row count and snapshot list unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: spacing_and_sizing_follow_scale
criteria.description: Spacing and sizing across the sidebar, toolbar, grid, and panels follow a consistent scale, with no arbitrary one-off values visible in computed styles
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: specified_quantities_match
criteria.description: Specified quantities are implemented as written: at least 3 seeded datasets, a flagship of at least 500 rows with at least 2 duplicate groups, at least 2 sample CSV fixtures, at least 1 seeded snapshot and threshold rule, and at least 3 eval suites
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: layout_matches_spec
criteria.description: The realized layout matches the specified composition: dataset list above the instrumentation panel on the left, toolbar above the grid, thresholds/splits/snapshots as side panels, and an export drawer with Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON tabs
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate

criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_spec
criteria.description: Responsive behavior matches the spec: sidebar collapses behind a toggle at 768 pixels and below, and the grid, mapping table, and diff scroll in their own containers at 375 pixels
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: control_styling_is_consistent

criteria.name: typography_has_clear_hierarchy

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec

criteria.name: semantic_color_treatments_match

criteria.name: empty_states_are_designed

criteria.name: forms_validate_inline

criteria.name: errors_are_actionable

criteria.name: scan_shows_progress

criteria.name: non_obvious_controls_have_help

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the enhancement is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: Verified through code inspection and Playwright testing. Changes explicitly prevent double activations and validate splitting functionality.

criteria.name: import_batches_animate

criteria.name: single_row_slide_in

criteria.name: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation

criteria.name: export_after_mutations_includes_session

criteria.name: import_package_restores_exported_state

criteria.name: csv_import_pipeline_updates_all_surfaces

criteria.name: numeric_edit_ripple_reaches_snapshot_diff

criteria.name: duplicate_merge_rescan_round_trip
